zh.Rehoboth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Ormsby於1602年7月28日出生在英國林可爾史爾德列索普 哥吉拉 沙智時，他的父親Thomas Ormsby22歲，母親Mary Underwood22歲。他於1640年8月9日與Sarah Upham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克薩可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1622年住在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德列索普 聖 海倫 煙雨 馬波索普 聖 彼得。他去世於1664年6月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Ormsby于1602年7月28日出生在英国林可爾史爾德列索普 哥吉拉 沙智时，他的父亲Thomas Ormsby22岁，母亲Mary Underwood22岁。他于1640年8月9日与Sarah Upham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克薩可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1622年住在英国英格兰林可爾史爾德列索普 聖 海倫 煙雨 馬波索普 聖 彼得。他去世于1664年6月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Ormsby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from North and South Ormsby (Lincolnshire), or either of two places called Ormesby in Norfolk and the North Yorkshire. The placenames all derive from the Old Norse personal name Ormr + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. This surname is also common in Ireland (Connacht), where it has been established since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Ormsby was born on 28 July 1602, in Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Ormsby, was 22 and his mother, Mary Underwood, was 22. He married Sarah Upham on 9 August 1640, in Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Theddlethorpe St Helen with Mablethorpe St Peter, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom in 1622. He died on 30 June 1664, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Ormsby est né le 28 juillet 1602, à Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ormsby, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Underwood, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Upham le 9 août 1640, à Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Theddlethorpe St Helen with Mablethorpe St Peter, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1622. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1664, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Ormsby am 28. Juli 1602 in Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ormsby 22 und seine Mutter Mary Underwood 22. Er hat am 9. August 1640 in Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Upham geheiratet. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Ormsbyが1602年7月28日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスエッドレソルペ アル サインツで生まれた時，父Thomas Ormsbyは22歳，母Mary Underwoodは22歳であった。1640年8月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークサコでSarah Uphamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1622年にはイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスエッドレソルペ スト ヘレン ウィス マブレソルペ スト ペターに住んでいた。彼は1664年6月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Rehoboth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Ormsby(이)가 1602년 7월 28일 영국 링코실르 테들레소 앨 세인츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ormsby(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Underwood(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1640년 8월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 사코에서 Sarah Upham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1622년도에 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 테들레소 스트 헬 위스 마블레소 스트 피터에서 살았다. 그는 1664년 6월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

ru.Rehoboth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Ormsby родился 28 июля 1602 г. в местности теддлетаурп алл сеинц, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ormsby было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Underwood, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Upham 9 августа 1640 г. в местности сако, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности теддлетаурп ст хелен вит маблетаурп ст питир, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1622 году. Он умер 30 июня 1664 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Ormsby nació el 28 de julio de 1602, en Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Ormsby, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Underwood, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sarah Upham el 9 de agosto de 1640, en Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Theddlethorpe St Helen with Mablethorpe St Peter, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1622. Murió el 30 de junio de 1664, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
